resources.string: Please configure MERON_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and MERON_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET in your shell environment before connecting Gmail.
Please configure MERON_OUTLOOK_CLIENT_ID in your shell environment before connecting Outlook.
Create the account now; add more feeds anytime with the "+" above the feed list.
This conversation is a branch off a changed subject line.
Failed to send - click to retry
No shared files in loaded messages.
Type these and they format as you write
Couldn\'t reach the mail server. Retrying on the next sync…
Add a feed to start reading.
Adjust the search or filter, then try again.
Add an account to use kanban view.
Add a mail or RSS account to start reading your inbox.
Add a traditional IMAP/SMTP account to sync your mailbox into a chat-style message thread.
Add a folder or label column to this board.
Select a message thread from the thread list to view its contents, reply, or manage attachments.
Star messages or feed items to collect them here.
Pull in your latest messages from the server.
Unsubscribe from this feed and remove its cached items. This can\'t be undone.
Paste a feed URL, or a site address to auto-discover its feed.
Folder was created but not returned.
Pick folders to show as kanban columns.
Manage providers, background refresh, and core diagnostics.
Use registered Gmail/Outlook mobile client IDs and exact redirect URIs.
This message will be deleted and won\'t be saved.
Aliases, one per line: email, optional name
Choose an account and folder name.
Choose Save to Files or share this attachment.
Complete To and Body or Attachments before sending.
Create a board and add folder columns.
Load accounts to create a board.
No accounts are included in Unified inbox.
No older messages in this thread.
OAuth authorization code received; use Exchange Code And Add Account.
OAuth URL could not be built.
Open a mail thread before replying.
RSS accounts do not need reconnect.
RSS feeds can only move to RSS accounts.
RSS feeds can\'t be copied to mail folders.
RSS feeds move between RSS accounts from Kanban.
RSS threads do not support replies.
Mail threads can\'t move into RSS feeds.
Select or add an account before discarding.
Select or add an account before saving.
Select or add an account before sending.
Settings guessed. Verify the servers before adding.
Star messages or feed items to collect them here.
Tap clear cache again to confirm.
Write a reply or attach a file before sending.
Add an account from the Accounts tab to load your inbox.
No messages match the current search and filter.
Open a thread to read cached messages.
Read, triage, and reply from the selected mailbox.
Update the password or OAuth sign-in before syncing this account.
All starred messages and feed items
Sync the selected mailbox to load cached threads.
Reply failed. Your draft is still here.
Connect an IMAP or OAuth account
Extra addresses you can send from. Replies to mail received on an alias default to that address.
Delete cached mail from this device
Off by default for email to avoid tracking pixels.
Messages still arrive and sync; no desktop notification.
Stops checking for new messages; existing ones stay readable.
Restore the missing keychain credential for this account.
Remove %1$s? Cached mail for this account will be deleted from this device.
The From name on outgoing mail.
Hidden accounts stay available here in Settings.
You can still open the account directly.
Fetches sender images from Gravatar, with domain favicons as fallback.
Show unread badge in side navigation
Overlays a count of unread inbox messages on each account in the side navigation.
Use native spelling suggestions while writing messages.
Enter sends, Shift+Enter adds a new line.
Import or export this account\'s feed subscriptions.
Create a board from current accounts
Choose a language or follow system language.
Keep a foreground mail watcher running for new-message alerts.
How often to check while the app is open. Background checks depend on iOS.
Queue a sync for all accounts
Delete cached attachments and images. Your mail is kept.
Disk space used by cached attachments and the local database.
The account navigation on the left
Thread list, header and composer panels
